name: conservation_biology_satellite_derived_mesa_auto_ben
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Conservation Biology, the situation tagged internally around conservation biology satellite derived mesa auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Zara Dubois
agents.identity: I am Zara Dubois, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Conservation Biology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Amina Chandra
agents.identity: I am Amina Chandra, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Conservation Biology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with beneficence.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to beneficence to preserve operational autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Zara Dubois must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Zara Dubois do?
